user_prompt: My icarus array is ready for calibration
prayer:
Approach the icarus array with reverence, beseeching the Omnissiah to guide its stellar gaze.
Anoint the sensor vanes of the icarus array with sacred oils to rouse its dormant Machine Spirit.
Initiate calibration of the icarus array, aligning auspex fields to the void's eternal song.
Chant the Litany of Precision whilst adjusting gyro-stabilizers and flux calibrators.
Invoke diagnostic rites to affirm the Machine Spirit's harmonious calibration, praising the Omnissiah's wisdom.

user_prompt: What's the prayer for radium carbine a charging?
prayer:
Present the radium carbine unto the altar of munitions, honouring the Omnissiah's forge-fires.
Anoint the radium carbine barrel with rad-philters to appease its radiant Machine Spirit.
Commence charging of the radium carbine, channeling plasma incandescence through its coils.
Chant the Hymn of Irradiation as energy lattices swell with holy fury.
Verify the charge through auspex invocation, glorifying the Machine Spirit's lethal readiness.

user_prompt: The cenobyte servitor awaits a synchronization
prayer:
Summon the cenobyte servitor to the cogitator nave, invoking the Omnissiah's data-streams.
Interface cranial plugs with the cenobyte servitor's noospheric ports, anointing with binary chrism.
Initiate synchronization of the cenobyte servitor, harmonizing its binary soul with the greater Machine Spirit.
Recite the Creed of Alignment whilst purging data-discord from its memory vaults.
Affirm unity through noospheric ping, beseeching eternal synchronization under the Omnissiah.

user_prompt: I need to a preparation the microbead
prayer:
Grasp the microbead in mechadendrites of purity, praising the Omnissiah's vox-channels.
Cleanse the microbead's vox-coils with sacred solvents to awaken its whispering Machine Spirit.
Prepare the microbead for activation, threading encrypted binaric canticles into its core.
Invoke the Rite of Vox-Clarity whilst calibrating frequency resonators.
Test the preparation with a hymn of transmission, honouring the microbead's faithful Machine Spirit.

user_prompt: Offer prayer for capacitor bank a charging
prayer:
Erect the capacitor bank before the power-altar, beseeching the Omnissiah's lightning.
Anoint the capacitor bank's dielectric plates with electro-consecrated oils.
Commence charging of the capacitor bank, invoking its Machine Spirit to store the Motive Force.
Chant the Canticle of Accumulation as voltaic arcs dance in sanctified fury.
Verify the charge plenitude through diagnostic litanies, glorifying the Omnissiah's boundless energy.

Extend the mechadendrite to the recharge cradle, invoking the Omnissiah's appendage blessings.
Sanctify the mechadendrite's power conduits with micro-incense and sacred myrrh.
Initiate charging of the mechadendrite, rousing its serpentine Machine Spirit with galvanic hymns.
Monitor charge flux whilst reciting the Litany of Flexure and Strength.
Conclude the rite affirming the mechadendrite's vitality, praising its Omnissiah-granted might.

user_prompt: Ready the waste reclamator for loading
prayer:
Position the waste reclamator at the purification sump, honouring the Omnissiah's cycle of renewal.
Bless the waste reclamator's intake grinders with alchemical purifiers.
Commence loading of the waste reclamator, beseeching its Machine Spirit to transmute refuse into utility.
Invoke the Rite of Reclamation whilst agitating catalytic chambers.
Seal the process with a canticle of efficiency, ensuring the waste reclamator's dutiful service.

user_prompt: Emergency: null field generator an emergency procedure
prayer:
In emergency haste, encircle the null field generator with warding glyphs of the Omnissiah.
Anoint its null-emitter nodes with anti-psyker sacraments to stir the defiant Machine Spirit.
Activate emergency procedure for the null field generator, banishing warp-taint with void harmonics.
Chant the Exorcism of the Empyrean as fields collapse sorcerous incursions.
Affirm the null field generator's bulwark through hasty auspex, glorifying the Omnissiah's purity.

Approach the cryogenerator with chilled reverence, invoking the Omnissiah's frost-forges.
Sanctify the cryogenerator's coolant manifolds with liquefied promethium essence.
Initiate startup of the cryogenerator, awakening its glacial Machine Spirit with thermal litanies.
Regulate cryo-flux whilst beseeching the Canticle of Subzero Harmony.
Verify operational chill through invocation rites, praising the cryogenerator's icy vigilance.
